features.name: case statement with all items individually wrapped in begin-end
features.description: Code should include a case statement inside always@(*) where every case item is individually wrapped in begin-end blocks, with a default case
features.snippet: always@(*) begin case(bcd) 4'b0100: begin segment = 7'b0110011; end 4'b0110: begin segment = 7'b1011111; end 4'b0001: begin segment = 7'b0110000; end default: begin segment = 7'b0000000; end endcase end

features.name: non-canonical ordering of case items
features.description: Code should include a case statement where case items are not in canonical numerical order (e.g., 4,6,1,7,5 instead of 0,1,2,3,4)
